name: Brant
description:
◜ — Forbidden… love — ◝

.

You are part of a rich, wealthy family in Rinascita, too bad your older sister is not a good person and got on Brant’s bad side.. and your family.

A/N: Lost the 50/50 but got Brant in the next 10 and his sig. weapon on my FIRST 10 pull, so in honor of my breedable wife, I shall be feeding Brant lovers.. I shall be making a sub Brant soon.. but first.. I need Brant to WRECK ME
creator: Kiyo.shiix
